name: dependabot-lock-file-sync
hook: Dependabot PRs need lock file updates for --frozen-lockfile CI
body: When dependabot bumps dev dependency versions in package.json, the pnpm-lock.yaml must also be updated. CI runs with --frozen-lockfile which installs the OLD versions from the stale lock file, not the new versions dependabot proposed. Always run `pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile` after dependabot dependency bumps before merging.
why: CI will silently install old package versions from the stale lock file, causing ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND or other compatibility issues even though package.json has the correct newer versions. This masquerades as a test/code problem when it's purely a lock file sync issue.
